interface.shortDescription: Author and ship Boardwalk agent workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A thin Codex plugin bundling CLI-oriented skills for installing and driving the `boardwalk` CLI — scaffold a workflow, run it locally, validate it, deploy it, and trigger real runs.
defaultPrompt: Install the Boardwalk CLI and scaffold a new workflow.
Run my Boardwalk workflow locally and show the output.
Deploy this workflow to my Boardwalk org and trigger a run.
